calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Feb-17-2016 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearance on Wednesday, February 17, 2016, in Department 525:
No Appearance by Respondent/Plaintiff Robert Meadows.
Robert O'Connor, Appellant/Defendant appears as Propria Persona with witness Charles O'Connor.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. Robert O'Connor and witness are sworn.
Appellant/Defendant, Robert O'Connor testifies on his own behalf and responds to the questions from the Court. The following documentary evidence is introduced:
Exhibit (1) - lease agreement
(2) - 4 pages -Erica e-mails
(3) - 2 pages of photos - piano &damage stair; repair invoices
(4) - itemize invoice

At the conclusion of the hearing, the Court takes this matter under submission. Newly marked evidence is retained by the Court.

Judge Pro Tem Diana Kruze; Clerk J. Kong; Matter Not Reported.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Jan-13-2016 Judgment Entered

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Oct-26-2015 Continued To Jan-12-16 At 03:30 P.M. In Dept 506
